rows.preferred_term: identityState
rows.rationale: Normalize one-off schema or summary wording back to the canonical `identityState` axis.

rows.preferred_term: IdentityRepairCase + closure blocker metadata
rows.rationale: Represent wrong-patient freeze through `IdentityRepairCase`, blocker refs, and release settlement rather than a workflow state label.

rows.preferred_term: case-local gate or confirmation pending term, never canonical Request.workflowState
rows.rationale: Use booking or pharmacy case-local ambiguity terms plus `ExternalConfirmationGate` instead of putting `reconciliation_required` on `Request.workflowState`.

rows.preferred_term: SubmissionEnvelope.state = draft
rows.rationale: Pre-submit draft belongs to `SubmissionEnvelope.state`, not `Request.workflowState`.

rows.preferred_term: CommandSettlementRecord
rows.rationale: Local acknowledgement is not authoritative outcome; normalize calmness and recovery posture through `CommandSettlementRecord`.
